title: pseudognaphalium marranum
intro: Pseudognaphalium marranum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of cudweed. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium marranum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
